revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-6-210

Alternative term: Cage (U.S.A.)

That part of the buoy built on top of the body of the buoy and used as a daymark or part thereof and usually to support the light or a topmark or a radar reflector, or a combination of these.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig61.jpg|400px|border]]


{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Superstructure (of a buoy, usually lighted)}}
